UPDATE fin_accounting_subjects SET subject_level = CASE WHEN LENGTH(subject_code) = 4 THEN 1 WHEN LENGTH(subject_code) = 6 THEN 2 WHEN LENGTH(subject_code) = 8 THEN 3 ELSE 1 END WHERE groupid = #{groupId} ;
UPDATE fin_accounting_subjects s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT parent_code FROM fin_accounting_subjects WHERE groupid = #{groupId} GROUP BY parent_code ) children ON s.subject_code = children.parent_code SET s.is_leaf = CASE WHEN children.parent_code IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE s.groupid = #{groupId} ;
